tooltip.create_balloon.hot_air_balloon.1: Provides vertical lift on physical structures
tooltip.create_balloon.hot_air_balloon.2: Lift decreases at higher altitudes due to air pressure
tooltip.create_balloon.hot_air_balloon.3: Lift Capacity: 100 kpg  |  Gas cools over time — place near a heat source!
tooltip.create_balloon.hot_air_balloon.4: Air Pressure: decreases exponentially with altitude
tooltip.create_balloon.console.1: Right-click to lock controls and pilot the balloon
tooltip.create_balloon.console.2: SPACE: Ascend  |  V: Descend  |  SHIFT: Exit control
tooltip.create_balloon.console.3: Requires Balloon blocks nearby on the same structure
msg.create_balloon.console.offstructure: You are no longer on the structure. Control exited.
